zh.Culcheth Manor, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾爾謝斯
zh.Warburton, Bucklow, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾瓦布爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffery de Warburton於1272年出生在英國爾瓦布爾頓時，他的父親Geoffrey de Warburton I24歲，母親Margaret31歲。他和Margaret le Boteler至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1360年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Culcheth Manor, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾爾謝斯
zh-hans.Warburton, Bucklow, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾瓦布爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffery de Warburton于1272年出生在英国爾瓦布爾頓时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Warburton I24岁，母亲Margaret31岁。他和Margaret le Boteler至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1360年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Warburton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Greater Manchester (formerly in Cheshire) called Warburton, from the Old English female personal name Wǣrburg (composed of the elements wǣr ‘pledge’ + burh ‘fortress’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Warbritton
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Warburton  . This form of the surname is not found in English sources.

variants.name: Warbington
meanings: English (Lancashire): perhaps a variant of   Warburton  ; otherwise a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffery de Warburton was born in 1272, in Warburton, Cheshire, England, his father, Geoffrey de Warburton I, was 24 and his mother, Margaret, was 31. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Margaret le Boteler. He died after 1360, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffery de Warburton est né en 1272, à Warburton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Warburton I, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Margaret le Boteler. Il est décédé après 1360, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffery de Warburton 1272 in Warburton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Warburton I 24 und seine Mutter Margaret 31. Er hatte mit Margaret le Boteler mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb nach 1360 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffery de Warburton è nato il nel 1272 nel Warburton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Warburton I, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Margaret le Boteler. Morì dopo il 1360, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffery de Warburtonが1272年にイギリスチェシュアイアワーブルトンで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Warburton Iは24歳，母Margaretは31歳であった。彼はMargaret le Botelerとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1360年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffery de Warburton(이)가 1272년 영국 체실르 워버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Warburton I(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Margaret le Boteler(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1360년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffery de Warburton nasceu em 1272, em Warburton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Warburton I, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Margaret le Boteler. Ele faleceu após 1360, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffery de Warburton родился в 1272 г. в местности варбуртон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Warburton I было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 31. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Margaret le Boteler. Он умер после 1360 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffery de Warburton nació en 1272, en Warburton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Warburton I, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Margaret le Boteler. Murió después de 1360, en su pueblo.
